# Code of Conduct

## Our pledge

We are committed to providing a friendly and welcoming environment for everyone.

## Expected behavior

Participants in this project should:

- Be respectful
- Be constructive when giving feedback
- Avoid harassment or abusive language

## Unacceptable behavior

Examples of unacceptable behavior include:

- Harassment
- Insults or personal attacks
- Discriminatory language
- Trolling or disruptive behavior

## Enforcement

Project maintainers may remove comments, issues, or pull requests that violate this code of conduct.
